items.title: Baseball Pack architecture refactor
items.description: BaseballPackService, BaseballPackMarketingView, BaseballPackLockedView, BaseballPackBrowserView, BaseballPackPromoCard are all hardcoded to baseball. Needs sport-agnostic redesign with database-driven categories, mode-aware UI, and configurable pack definitions.

items.title: ArmCareStatusCard mode-aware recommendations
items.description: ArmCareStatusCard shows throwing-specific recommendations (Full throwing program OK, Reduce throwing 50%) to all users. Recommendations should be sport-mode-aware.

items.title: Test file decoder modernization
items.description: 181 iso8601 decoder instances remain in test files. Update incrementally when touching tests.

items.title: Loading skeleton screens
items.description: Replace spinner-based loading with skeleton/shimmer placeholders for program cards and workout lists.

items.title: Haptic feedback on key actions
items.description: Add haptic feedback on enrollment success, workout complete, streak milestone.
